case_title: THE ARLINGTON RESIDENCE vs. TRAYLER, VIRGEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE ARLINGTON RESIDENCE
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2000, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED.

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, VIRGIL

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT 210, AJROBERTSON, JUDGE; JJASMIN, CLERK; KFARNSWORTH, CSR. CRAMSEY, ESQ. APPR FOR PLNTF AND VIRGEL TRAYLER APPR IN PRO PER. SETTLEMENT TERMS READ INTO RECORD, TO WIT: JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER IN FAVOR OF THE ARLINGTON RESIDENCE AND AGAINST DEF VIRGEL TRAYLER FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 480 ELLIS STREET #118 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, SAID JUDGMENT STAYED IF DEF PAYS $600 O/B 17OCT00; $340 O/B 3NOV00; $340 O/B 10NOV00; $340 O/B 27NOV00 AND $30 O/B 17DEC00. IF TERMS BREACHED, PLNTF MAY PETITION EX-PARTE FOR WRIT WITH 48 HOURS NOTICE. PLNTF COUNSEL TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, VIRGIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 480 ELLIS STREET #118, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,650.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, PLEASE SEE JUDGMENT FOR EXTENSIVE CONDITIONS RELATIVE TO PAYMENTS AND STAY.
